name: Salesforce API Playground
description: A Next.js playground for Salesforce OAuth and REST API operations.

SALESFORCE_CLIENT_ID.description: Salesforce external client app consumer key.

SALESFORCE_CLIENT_SECRET.description: Salesforce external client app consumer secret.

SALESFORCE_REDIRECT_URI.description: OAuth callback URL. Set this to https://<heroku-app-host>/api/auth/callback and register the same URL in Salesforce.

SESSION_SECRET.description: Random secret used to encrypt session cookies.

SALESFORCE_INTEGRATION_CLIENT_ID.description: Salesforce client credentials flow consumer key.

SALESFORCE_INTEGRATION_CLIENT_SECRET.description: Salesforce client credentials flow consumer secret.

SALESFORCE_INTEGRATION_LOGIN_URL.description: Salesforce My Domain URL for client credentials flow.

INTEGRATION_API_KEY.description: Shared API key for server-to-server integration endpoints.

APP_ENV.description: Runtime environment label source. The Heroku Button default marks a standalone playground app, not a managed staging environment.
